title: Project Management
description: Demo list built on top of the shared data table wrapper.

createModal.title: Create Project
createModal.proxyHint: A registry (e.g. https://huggingface.co) must first be created in Registry Management. Proxy is supported at the Organization or personal account level. When the model path is org/model (e.g. Qwen/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B), fill in the Organization name (Qwen). For personal models, fill in the username.

deleteModal.title: Delete Project
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

validation.nameMinLength: Project name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameFormat: Only letters, numbers and hyphens allowed; must start and end with a letter or number
validation.nameDistinctChars: Project name must contain at least two different characters
validation.organizationRequired: Organization or user is required when proxy is enabled
validation.registryRequired: Registry is required when proxy is enabled
